Text: Select destination building to move connections to.
Adjusts where lines connect to buildings (0.0 is the bottom, 0.5 is the middle, 1.0 is the top)
Controls thickness of connection lines glow
Sets the opacity of the glow of lines (0.0 is completely invisible, 1.0 is fully opaque)
Adjusts how bright the connection lines are when an automator is turned off or inactive
Controls how the automation network map is shown (Hidden, Single selected network, or Global)
